playbook.intent: Spec-ready stories → SDD feature folders with spec.md + design.md + implementation-plan.md broken into TASK_*.md files.
playbook.scope: Bi-weekly sprint planning. Spec-ready stories that came out of grooming become SDD feature folders under `.aidocs/in-progress/<feature>/`: spec.md + design.md (where complexity demands) + implementation-plan.md broken into TASK_*.md files in `tasks/todo/`. Capacity is decided from team velocity and complexity tags — token estimates only, no time estimates. The tracker mirrors the SDD layout.

success-criteria.criterion: Each selected story has spec.md + (where needed) design.md
implementation-plan.md broken into TASK_*.md files in tasks/todo/
Capacity confirmed from velocity + complexity tags
Promotion-gate checklist signed off per feature
Tracker mirrors the SDD folder layout

stage.name: Promote spec-ready stories
stage.intent: Stories chosen from backlog get promoted into SDD feature folders.

tasks.task: Initialise feature folder under backlog/ or todo/ per promotion gate

outputs.output: Initial feature folders with spec.md drafts

stage.decision-gate: Advance once each promoted story has a spec.md and passes DoR. No promotion without it.

stage.name: Design where needed
stage.intent: Features touching cross-service boundaries get a design.md.

outputs.output: design.md per feature that needs it

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every cross-service feature has a design.md AND every isolated feature has an explicit waiver in the spec.

stage.name: Expand to tasks

tasks.task: Apply task-creation-parallelization where it pays off

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every promoted feature has a tasks/todo/ tree with self-contained task files.

stage.name: Decide capacity + commit
stage.intent: Velocity + complexity tags fit inside confirmed capacity; sprint commit posted.

tasks.task: Map sized tasks to confirmed capacity

stage.decision-gate: Required: sprint commit signed off. Overcommitting at this gate = guaranteed mid-sprint scope cut.

extra.value: [Spec/design authoring from scratch — see rfc-to-production-feature-delivery, Daily execution — see daily-standup-ai-prebrief, Quarterly OKR setting — see quarter-planning-okr-reset]
[Backlog grooming completed in the same week, SDD feature directory layout convention adopted (backlog → todo → in-progress → done), Token-budget heuristic agreed by team]

[Promoting stories without spec.md — task files become guesswork, Time estimates sneaking in — violates the No-Time-Estimates rule, Skipping design.md on a cross-service feature — bites at QA stage, Tracker drifts from SDD layout — devs lose source of truth]
['Does every task have a self-contained TASK_*.md?', 'Is the sprint commit reachable given last 2 sprints'' velocity?', 'Does each spec.md pass the DoR checklist?']

{human: faion get-content sprint-planning-sdd-task-expansion --format md, agent: faion get-content sprint-planning-sdd-task-expansion --format context, json: faion get-content sprint-planning-sdd-task-expansion --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
